# init

**Instance Method**

Initializes the dispatch queue object.

## Declaration

```swift
virtual bool init(void);
```

## Return Value

`true` if initialization was successful, or `false` if it was unsuccessful.

## Discussion

Do not call this method directly. Call [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/kernel/iodispatchqueue/3438189-create] when you want to create a new dispatch queue.

## Creating a Dispatch Queue

- **Create**: Creates a new dispatch queue object.
- **free**: Performs any final cleanup for the dispatch queue object.
